broadcastNotify.calendarIcsDesc: Broadcast schedule is not set yet
broadcastNotify.reauth: Kakao authentication expired. Please login again.

broadcastDiag.title: 🔍 Broadcast Detection Diagnostics
broadcastDiag.subtitle: Check the items below to locate the issue.
broadcastDiag.hintNetworkAuth: Network or authentication issue. Try refreshing or logging in again.
broadcastDiag.hintYTLive: YouTube detected as live. Waiting for auto-switch in app.
broadcastDiag.hintYTReady: YouTube is receiving RTMP signal but not live yet. Press Start Broadcast in your streaming tool.
broadcastDiag.hintYTCreated: YouTube is not receiving RTMP signal. Check RTMP URL/Key in your streaming tool.
broadcastDiag.hintOBSNotSet: OBS WebSocket not configured. OK if streaming directly; configure OBS for auto-start.
broadcastDiag.hintOBSHttps: ws://localhost blocked on HTTPS. Install Chrome Extension "UR Live — OBS Bridge".
broadcastDiag.hintOBSProcess: Make sure OBS window is open. RTMP streaming stops if OBS is closed.
broadcastDiag.hintPrism: Check that Prism app is actually streaming on your phone. Make sure you pressed "Stream", not "Record".
broadcastDiag.hintYTStudio: Check if you pressed "Go Live" in the YouTube Studio popup. Reopen if closed.
